name: Hilton Hotels & Resorts

current_snapshot.headquarters: 7930 Jones Branch Drive, Suite 1100, McLean, Virginia 22102

validation_questions: Confirm Item 19 cohort size and definition with franchisor.

internal_unresolveds.reason: No renewal right with $50M–$204M investment — franchise is non-renewable, re-licensing at franchisor's sole discretion with potentially materially different terms
All assets and franchise contracts pledged as collateral for Hilton parent debt obligations (maturing 2025–2033)
5 pending antitrust class actions related to IDeaS/STR/Amadeus revenue management software — uncertain outcome
Gag clause: some current and former franchisees restricted from speaking about their experience
No protected territory by default; negotiable Restricted Area has extensive carve-outs and time-limited Restrictive Period
No cost/profitability data in Item 19 — only top-line performance metrics (room rate, occupancy, indices)
Liquidated damages formula for pre-2yr termination uses system-wide average which may exceed hotel-specific average
Subsequent events note references March 18, 2024 but audit opinion dated March 18, 2025 — likely typographical error
canonical schema not parsed by first-200 extractor
